      children: ["Sharding is a technique, normally used in server side databases, where the database is partitioned horizontally. Instead of storing all documents at one table/collection, the documents are split into so called ", _jsx(_components.strong, {
        children: "shards"
      }), " and each shard is stored on one table/collection. This is done in server side architectures to spread the load between multiple physical servers which ", _jsx(_components.strong, {
